title: State Department Bypasses Congress to Send Israel More Than 20,000 Bombs
summary_full: The sale had been under informal review in Congress, but the State Department declared an emergency because of the war in Iran.
summary_public: The sale had been under informal review in Congress, but the State Department declared an emergency because of the war in Iran.
